title: Power Unlimited 2
subTitle: Karthikeya, a man who is devoted to his family, faces a huge challenge as his violent and turbulent past begins to resurface.

title: Kayamkulam Kochunni
subTitle: Ill-treated since childhood by the wealthy people, Kayamkulam Kochunni decides to steal from the rich and feed the poor and the lower caste community, thus growing into a hero for the downtrodden.

title: Khakee
subTitle: A deputy commissioner and his crew attempt to transport a terrorist to Mumbai, but their mission is thwarted by an ex-policeman with an agenda of his own.

title: Jigar Kaleja
subTitle: A short tempered cab driver, Raju, unwillingly becomes the saviour of a village. When an industrialist tries to drive away the villagers by polluting their water and air, Raju steps up to help them.

title: Bharaate
subTitle: Jagan, a local travel guide, falls in love with Radha, a tourist who visits his city. Though she leaves without saying goodbye, fate conspires to being them together again.

title: Fidaa
subTitle: An NRI medical student falls in love with a vivacious woman. However, they face challenges in their relationship due to their differences in personalities.

title: Aakhri Yudh
subTitle: Babji, a loan recovery agent, decides to help Kavya when he finds her being chased by her family. However, Kavya's brother thinks that Babji and her sister are lovers and attacks his family.

title: Yashoda
subTitle: Surrogate mother Yashodha is advised to follow a few guidelines to keep herself and her baby healthy and safe. However, something happens at the surrogate centre that puts both of them at risk.

title: Dashing CM Bharat
subTitle: Bharat, a graduate from Oxford, is forced to take up his father's position as the chief minister after his sudden death. He tries to reform the corrupt society but faces obstacles from his enemies.

title: Ragada
subTitle: Satya, a money-minded man, arrives in Hyderabad and starts working for a gangster, GK. However, he soon becomes the target of another gangster, Peddanna.

title: Ragada
subTitle: Satya, a money-minded man, arrives in Hyderabad and starts working for a gangster, GK. However, he soon becomes the target of another gangster, Peddanna.

title: Action Blaster
subTitle: Anil Anto, a TV operator, moves to Kochi with his pregnant wife in order to start a new life. There, Anil crosses paths with Darvin, a gangster, post an unfortunate incident.

title: Veeram The Powerman
subTitle: A fearless young man vows to mend his violent ways after falling in love with a beautiful maiden. However, he is forced to resort to violence after a gang of nefarious criminals pursue his lady love.

title: Dashing Jigarwala 2
subTitle: When the students of the Travancore Maharaja College start to form gangs and engage in crime and brutal fights, Edward Livingston, an English professor decides to restore order in the campus.

title: Dhruva
subTitle: A committed police officer, Dhruva, uncovers a web of organised crime headed by a scientist, Siddharth Abhimanyu. But when Dhruva tries to build a case against him, he faces many challenges.

title: Angel
subTitle: Nani discovers a rare antique idol from the excavation site at Amaravati. He wants to sell it and keep the money for himself, but before he can do that, the idol goes missing.

title: Jaguar
subTitle: Krishna, an orphan medical student, lives a seemingly ordinary life. However, unbeknownst to people, he is a vigilante named Jaguar who pursues a certain group of people in order to kill them.

title: Yudh Ek Jung
subTitle: Chandu, a supermarket employee, encounters trouble when he decides to help Indu, an aspiring actress, and gets embroiled in a murder case.

title: Maargan
subTitle: A serial killer targets women with a strange serum that turns their bodies black. Subsequently, a high-ranking police officer sets out to catch the culprit.

title: Sangharsh Aur Vijay
subTitle: Badri is the protector of Badrinath temple. However, when a woman falls in love with him, his guru decides against making Badri his successor.

title: Meri Saugandh
subTitle: Ramu loves Lakshmi, whose father is the chief of the village. In order to prove his love, Ramu must win a challenge posed by a rival village and beat Giridhar, who is also keen on marrying Lakshmi.

title: Meri Saugandh
subTitle: Ramu loves Lakshmi, whose father is the chief of the village. In order to prove his love, Ramu must win a challenge posed by a rival village and beat Giridhar, who is also keen on marrying Lakshmi.

title: Bunglow No 17
subTitle: Gautham and Deeksha, along with their daughter, move into an isolated bungalow gifted to them by Gautham's father. Soon, they start experiencing paranormal activities around the house.

title: Vasco The Rebel
subTitle: With unwavering support from his lover, a defiant young man carves his way into the mafia world. His journey takes a turn when a relentless police officer pursues him.

subTitle: Bringing the best in television.
